headline: Is Comcast (CMCSA) Offering An Opportunity After Its Recent Share Price Slide
summary: Wondering if Comcast at around US$26.24 is a bargain or a value trap? This article breaks down what the current price might be implying about the stock. Over the last week the stock returned about a 3.0% loss, with 30-day and year-to-date returns of 5.6% and 11.2% declines, and a 1-year return of a 14.6% loss, which may have some investors reassessing both risk and potential reward. Recent coverage has focused on Comcast as a large US telecom and media stock, with attention on how its mix of...
